title: Glitched Tools
description: This mod adds a new ingot to obtain overpowered tools. With great power comes great responsibilities
body:
**Glitched Tools**
===
This mod introduces a new ingot and nugget, along with advancements that allow for the creation of overpowered tools.

Tools Description:

- All can break ancient debris
- All have an enchantibility of 99999
- All have an efficiency of 99999
- All have an attack dmg of 99999
- All have an attack spd of 99
- All have a durability of 99999

Glitched Fragment Recipe:

- 1 Nether star
- 4 Diamonds
- 4 Netherite scrap

  ![fragment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bbed19d9128b70b672d296ab90a9e15a46705c0.png)

- An advancement will be given

Raw Glitched Ingot Recipe:

- 4 Buckets of lava
- 4 Blocks of gold
- 1 Glitched Fragment

  ![Raw](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed0686e7ccf8e46244b4bb530e4da7d20726b164.png)

Refined Glitched Ingot:

- Blasting only

![refined](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50ff7ee6b23489303c9d24505fdadb4662ad73c4.png)

Tool recipes:

Glitched Sword:

- 2 Refined glitched ingots
- 1 Stick

![sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d74655b0c362a00ebfcbbd714b4ef070c41e44e1.png)

Glitched Pickaxe:

- 3 Refined glitched ingots
- 2 Sticks
  
![pick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b945987ef85e4db08acf7147e523cf0c4af0dc32.png)

And so on, check the gallery for crafting recipes. Making tools are only with sticks and **Refined Glitched Ingot**
